description: This prompt generates a soft pastel anime illustration of an elf girl typing at her computer in a cozy kawaii workspace, ideal for social posts, wallpapers, or streamer-themed art.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 生成柔和粉彩动漫风格的精灵女孩在温馨可爱工作区使用电脑的插画，适用于社交媒体帖子、壁纸或主播主题艺术。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 生成柔和粉彩動漫風格的精靈女孩在溫馨可愛工作區使用電腦的插畫，適用於社群媒體貼文、桌布或實況主題藝術。
description_i18n.ja: コージーでかわいいワークスペースでパソコンをタイピングするエルフ少女の柔らかなパステルアニメイラストを生成。SNS投稿、壁紙、配信者向けアートに最適。
description_i18n.ko: 아늑한 카와이 작업 공간에서 컴퓨터를 타이핑하는 엘프 소녀의 부드러운 파스텔 애니메이션 일러스트를 생성합니다. 소셜 게시물, 배경화면, 스트리머 테마 아트에 이상적입니다.
description_i18n.de: Generiert eine sanfte Pastell-Anime-Illustration eines Elfenmädchens, das in einem gemütlichen Kawaii-Arbeitsbereich am Computer tippt, ideal für Social Posts, Hintergrundbilder oder Streamer-Kunst.
description_i18n.fr: Génère une illustration anime pastel douce d'une fille elfe tapant sur son ordinateur dans un espace de travail kawaii confortable, idéal pour les publications sociales, fonds d'écran ou art pour streamers.
description_i18n.ru: Генерирует мягкую пастельную аниме-иллюстрацию эльфийки, печатающей за компьютером в уютном kawaii-пространстве, идеально для соцсетей, обоев или стримерского арта.
description_i18n.es: Genera una ilustración anime en tonos pastel suaves de una chica elfo escribiendo en su computadora en un acogedor espacio kawaii, ideal para publicaciones sociales, fondos de pantalla o arte para streamers.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Gera uma ilustração anime em tons pastéis suaves de uma garota elfa digitando no computador em um espaço de trabalho kawaii aconchegante, ideal para posts sociais, papéis de parede ou arte para streamers.
description_i18n.it: Genera un'illustrazione anime dai toni pastello morbidi di una ragazza elfo che digita al computer in un accogliente spazio di lavoro kawaii, ideale per post social, sfondi o arte a tema streamer.
description_i18n.vi: Tạo hình minh họa anime màu pastel nhẹ nhàng của cô gái tiên đang gõ phím máy tính trong không gian làm việc kawaii ấm cúng, lý tưởng cho bài đăng mạng xã hội, hình nền hoặc nghệ thuật streamer.
description_i18n.pl: Generuje miękką pastelową ilustrację anime przedstawiającą elfkę piszącą na komputerze w przytulnym kawaii workspace, idealną do postów społecznościowych, tapet lub grafik dla streamerów.
description_i18n.id: Menghasilkan ilustrasi anime pastel lembut dari gadis elf mengetik di komputer dalam ruang kerja kawaii yang nyaman, ideal untuk postingan sosial, wallpaper, atau seni bertema streamer.
description_i18n.nl: Genereert een zachte pastel anime-illustratie van een elfenmeisje dat typt aan haar computer in een gezellige kawaii werkruimte, ideaal voor social posts, wallpapers of streamer-gerelateerde kunst.
description_i18n.ar: ينشئ رسمًا توضيحيًا بألوان الباستيل الناعمة بأسلوب الأنمي لفتاة جن تكتب على حاسوبها في مساحة عمل kawaii مريحة، مثالي للمنشورات الاجتماعية أو خلفيات الشاشة أو فن الستريمر.
description_i18n.tr: Rahat bir kawaii çalışma alanında bilgisayarında yazı yazan bir elf kızının yumuşak pastel anime illüstrasyonunu oluşturur, sosyal gönderiler, duvar kağıtları veya yayıncı temalı sanat için idealdir.
description_i18n.uk: Генерує м'яку пастельну аніме-ілюстрацію ельфійки, що друкує за комп'ютером у затишному kawaii-просторі, ідеально для соцмереж, шпалер або стрімерського арту.
description_i18n.en: This prompt generates a soft pastel anime illustration of an elf girl typing at her computer in a cozy kawaii workspace, ideal for social posts, wallpapers, or streamer-themed art.

query.en: A cute pastel anime illustration of a young elf girl streamer or office worker sitting at a desk and typing on a mechanical keyboard in a cozy bedroom workspace, shown from a front three-quarter view with a large black computer monitor in the left foreground partially blocking her body. She has long wavy {argument name="hair color" default="orange"} hair with glossy highlights, pointed elf ears, and a small red flower hair clip on the right side, wearing a light blue pajama-style blouse covered in red heart prints with a very frilly white lace collar and a shiny red ribbon bow at the neck. Her hands are on the keyboard, nails painted soft pink, and she sits in a rounded pink desk chair. Above her head is a speech bubble containing a large question mark, suggesting confusion while working at the computer. The room is soft, bright, and feminine, with a pale pink and cream color palette, shallow depth of field, and delicate line art. In the background, include 1 framed wall picture with a pink animal and heart motif, 1 small potted plant near the center-left, 1 plush toy on a shelf behind her, 2 sticky notes on the upper right wall, one with a plus sign and one reading {argument name="note text" default="がんばろう!"}, 1 blue cat figurine or plush on the right shelf, 1 small potted plant on the right, 4 pastel binders or books on the lower right shelf, and 1 white mug with a pink heart on the desk in the lower right corner. The computer monitor should have a subtle glowing blue heart icon on its back, and the keyboard should have RGB lighting. Clean polished cel-shaded anime style, high detail, soft ambient lighting, cozy gamer desk atmosphere, pastel kawaii decor, 4k illustration.

Her hands are on the keyboard, nails painted soft pink, and she sits in a rounded pink desk chair. Above her head is a speech bubble containing a large question mark, suggesting confusion while working at the computer. The computer monitor should have a subtle glowing blue heart icon on its back, and the keyboard should have RGB lighting.
